sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot of the Rosh are regarded as the roots of the ten Sefirot of the Guf, and the Keter of the Rosh is the Keter of the roots. (Item 3)
